rings.description: Safe exploration — sheep meadows, the old well path, herb gathering grounds. Maren's ward-circle still holds here.
Unsettled territory — the Thinning Forest edge, abandoned farmsteads, thin places beginning to form. Weave is unstable.
Dangerous — deep Thinning Forest, frayed zones, the Loom Stone site. Ward protection does not reach here.

timePressure: The Hollowing ceremony is 6 weeks away. Without a Wardweaver to lead the Binding Song, the ward-circle will fail. Ward strength decays ~1 per week without maintenance (~2 in winter). Below 40%, Fray creatures begin appearing inside the settlement boundary.
